date_format: YYYY-MM-DD for dates; ISO 8601 for timestamps.
instructions: Return one JSON object. Use the keys, field types, enum casing, and list ordering defined here. Do not include explanatory prose outside JSON.
list_ordering: Lists of stable identifiers must be sorted ascending unless a field explicitly represents a priority queue.
numeric_precision: Counts are integers. Decimal scores or ratios, if any, should be rounded to 3 decimal places.

corrected_code_suggestions.description: Map only the referral IDs that require an ICD-10 correction to the corrected ICD-10 code. Do not include referrals that have no code correction.

value_schema.description: Corrected ICD-10 code, preserving decimal/case style from the codebook.

items.ordering: sort stable IDs ascending unless the field name says queue/ranking

duplicate_groups.ordering: sort stable IDs ascending unless the field name says queue/ranking

related_duplicate_referral_ids.ordering: sort stable IDs ascending unless the field name says queue/ranking

unrelated_referral_ids.ordering: sort stable IDs ascending unless the field name says queue/ranking

insurance_anomalies.ordering: sort stable IDs ascending unless the field name says queue/ranking

laterality_mismatch_referral_ids.ordering: sort stable IDs ascending unless the field name says queue/ranking

narrative_mismatch_referral_ids.ordering: sort stable IDs ascending unless the field name says queue/ranking

out_of_range_code_referral_ids.ordering: sort stable IDs ascending unless the field name says queue/ranking

title: April orthopedic referral quality audit
